Slot: BACK SECONDARY
AC: 3
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Class: WAR CLR SHD ROG
Race: DEF
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

AC: 3

Dark Sheild of Ebon

# Feb 19 2011 at 8:14 AM Rating: Good
snailish
4,580 posts
Killing any of the snakes (not just moss) near Neriak zone in will quickly give you the quest materials.

# Sep 02 2005 at 2:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263849614
2 posts
the only reason this quest is going is for the people that dont have any pp...but if the stuff that they work hard for is soooo awful to u ....give them some money and gear and im sure they wont bother hunting all that crap down and lvl.

Rogue Guild
QuoteReply
# May 16 2003 at 12:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257695591
1 post
you all carry about the shield... bla bla.. okay.. the shield isnt the right one but what abot the rogues guild??? think about it ;)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 08 2002 at 6:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) for the post at the top my lvl 1 warrior has a sarnak battleshield with a crap load of ac mr 40 hp and statsd accross the board and a 8k axe with a fbss probally 10 times the eq of your crappy lvl 44 pali
why is it?
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2001 at 11:42 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1594570526995
103 posts
why do people whine about items being awful/crappy...give it a rest. At lvl 1 your not going to get a shield with +20ac and bonus's across the board. For a lvl one with a rusted sword or other 1hs/b or whatever and a cloth tunic on your chest..ANY added ac is a plus..plus bashing if your class permits. So quite your crying about Verant giving awful items. You want any uber item go buy one. Remember this though..some of these folks that post an honest question or comment are new to the game, so they cant twink or buy those great items.

Aamadanae Whirlwind
44th Lvl Paladin
12th lvl Monk
2nd lvl Shadow Knight

# Jun 22 2001 at 10:15 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591761604676
8 posts
this quest is good and easy for lvl 1's. think about your necros that they pets carry shields and bash. Who cares if its LORE. Just do the quest again when you lose your pet. Think people and stop the crybaby crap. It may be crap to you TWINKed characters but for the rest of us who know how to use our imagination, this shield is good.

Matreon
11th Season Necro

Umm have you ever done this quest? The price is waaay off, this shield is worth at LEAST 15000pp. It took over 30 level 55+ people to take down these moss snakes, and the skins and the teeth are 00ber rare drops. All i can say is good luck! Its definitely worth it!
